UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the LibTrack Analytics application, including both administrative staff and visitors.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The institutional email address of the user. Used for login and identification.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the application. 'admin' for administrators, 'visitor' for general users.

blocked.description: Indicates if the user is currently blocked from accessing the system. (Default: false)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: Represents a single visit event, capturing visitor identity and purpose.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Visit entity.

userId.description: Reference to the Auth UID of the visitor.

visitorName.description: The full name of the visitor provided at check-in.

visitorEmail.description: The institutional email of the visitor provided at check-in.

visitorType.description: Whether the visitor is a student or an employee.

checkInTime.description: Timestamp when the visitor checked in.

checkOutTime.description: Optional timestamp when the visitor checked out.

collegeDepartment.description: The college department the visitor belongs to.

reason.description: The primary reason for the visit.

studentEmployeeId.description: The student or employee ID of the visitor (optional).

UserSession.title: UserSession
UserSession.description: Represents an active user session for real-time monitoring.

definition.description: Tracks active user sessions in real-time.
